recommendations.title: You Choose!
recommendations.overview: Even at the age of 40, Juliette is used to other people making decisions for her. When she meets two guys she likes, she has to finally make her own decision.

recommendations.title: Incognito
recommendations.overview: Lucas is an up-and-coming singer ready to do anything to be on top of the French pop scene.

recommendations.title: Protect and Serve
recommendations.overview: A pair of bumbling French cops team up to take on the underworld.

recommendations.title: Inner Workings
recommendations.overview: This is the story of the internal struggle between a man's Brain—a pragmatic protector who calculates his every move, and his Heart—a free-spirited adventurer who wants to let loose.

recommendations.title: Raging Bull
recommendations.overview: The life of boxer Jake LaMotta, whose violence and temper that led him to the top in the ring destroyed his life outside of it.
